individual_psc_list_why_need_to_wait_tit: Why do these PSCs need to wait?
individual_psc_list_why_need_to_wait_des: These PSCs were registered with Companies House before the new identity verification requirements were introduced. We are not able to accept their verification details until the company has reached its confirmation statement date.
individual_psc_list_cant_find_psc_title: I can't find the PSC I'm looking for
individual_psc_list_cant_find_psc_descri: You can only use this service to provide verification details for PSCs that are shown on the Companies House register. If the company has recently notified Companies House of a new PSC, you must wait until that filing is accepted and the new PSC appears on the public register.
